Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria G.

Quality Trim Work transformed my living room! The new crown molding is absolutely stunning, and the attention to detail is incredible. They were professional, on time, and cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!

D
David S.

Needed a new front door after the monsoon season warped the old one. Quality Trim Work was quick to respond, gave a fair price, and installed the new door perfectly. Minor issue with the paint color, but they fixed it immediately.

J
Jessica L.

We had Quality Trim Work install new baseboards throughout our entire house. The team was efficient, respectful, and the finished product looks fantastic. It really updated the whole look of our home!

R
Robert K.

I needed custom shelving built in my home office, and Quality Trim Work exceeded my expectations. The shelves are sturdy, beautiful, and perfectly tailored to my needs. Great communication throughout the entire process.

Additional Carpenter Services

Custom Trim Work Door Installation & Repair Baseboard Installation Crown Molding Installation

Quality Trim Work LLC — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every carpenter project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Quality Trim Work LLC Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific carpenter needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Phoenix & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Phoenix, AZ and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Scottsdale Mesa Chandler Gilbert Tempe Phoenix Paradise Valley Goodyear
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our carpenter services.

What types of wood do you use for trim work?

We use a variety of woods, including pine, poplar, oak, and MDF, depending on the desired look, budget, and application. We will discuss the best options for your project during the consultation.

Can you match existing trim in my home?

Yes, we are skilled at matching existing trim profiles and finishes to ensure a seamless and cohesive look throughout your home.

How long does it take to install custom trim?

The timeline depends on the scope of the project, but we provide a detailed estimate and schedule during the consultation. We strive to complete projects efficiently while maintaining the highest quality standards.

Built on Phoenix Values

Get a free consultation and estimate. Let's bring your vision to life with expert carpentry.

Let's Begin →
